title: anaphalis cinnamomea
intro: Anaphalis cinnamomea, also known as woolly meadowsweet or Chinese alpine meadowsweet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anaphalis cinnamomea include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Anaphalis cinnamomea can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote relaxation and ease digestive issues.
